artifacts.description: User-facing documentation for Pulse build orchestration system

summary: Successfully created comprehensive user-facing documentation for the Pulse build orchestration system. The documentation covers overview, terminology, quick start guide, commands reference, build creation, environment variables, monitoring, troubleshooting, and advanced features. Structured for n5os-ode users with practical examples and clear explanations.
tasks_completed: Created docs/PULSE.md with comprehensive Pulse documentation
Covered all required sections: overview, terminology, quick start, commands, build creation, environment variables
Provided practical examples and troubleshooting guidance
Maintained user-facing perspective without internal implementation details
Added proper YAML frontmatter with provenance tracking
learnings: Documentation should balance comprehensiveness with usability - included both basic quick-start and advanced features
Flow metaphor (Stream, Drop, Current, Deposit) provides intuitive mental model for complex orchestration
Troubleshooting section is critical for user documentation - included common issues and diagnostic commands
Examples should be concrete and actionable - provided actual command syntax and file structures
notes: Documentation is complete and ready for n5os-ode users. Covers the full Pulse workflow from build creation through completion and troubleshooting.
